message:
test(fcp-core): regenerate enrollment and simulate CBOR test vectors

Update request_vectors.cbor with fresh key IDs and request UUIDs
from the latest test vector generation run. Structure and schema
remain identical; only random/derived values changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
